message:
Make comment posting idempotent and handle existing entries

- Check for existing comment using HTML marker before posting
- Post success comment even when entry already exists
- Use different message for "already exists" vs "just created"
- Capture entry file path in check step for existing entries

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,9 +31,11 @@ runs:
       env:
         PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
       run: |
-        if grep -r "^pr: $PR_NUMBER$" */changelog/unreleased/*.md 2>/dev/null; then
-          echo "Changelog entry for PR #$PR_NUMBER already exists, skipping"
+        entry_file=$(grep -rl "^pr: $PR_NUMBER$" */changelog/unreleased/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+        if [ -n "$entry_file" ]; then
+          echo "Changelog entry for PR #$PR_NUMBER already exists: $entry_file"
           echo "skipped=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "file=$entry_file" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
         else
           echo "skipped=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
         fi
@@ -88,12 +90,13 @@ runs:
 
     # Step 5: Post PR comment
     - name: Post PR comment
-      if: steps.check.outputs.skipped != 'true' && steps.detect.outputs.created == 'true'
+      if: steps.check.outputs.skipped == 'true' || steps.detect.outputs.created == 'true'
       shell: bash
       env:
         GH_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.github_token }}
-        ENTRY_FILE: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.file }}
+        ENTRY_FILE: ${{ steps.check.outputs.file || steps.detect.outputs.file }}
         PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
         PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
         BRANCH: ${{ github.head_ref }}
+        MODE: ${{ steps.check.outputs.skipped == 'true' && 'existing' || 'created' }}
       run: ${{ github.action_path }}/scripts/post-comment.sh

@@ -1,6 +1,15 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -uo pipefail
 
+MARKER="<!-- changelog-adder-bot -->"
+
+# Check for existing comment to avoid duplicates
+existing=$(gh pr view "$PR_NUMBER" --json comments --jq ".comments[].body | select(contains(\"$MARKER\"))" 2>/dev/null)
+if [ -n "$existing" ]; then
+  echo "Comment already exists, skipping"
+  exit 0
+fi
+
 # Parse YAML frontmatter using sed (returns empty string on no match)
 frontmatter=$(awk '/^---$/{if(++n==2)exit}n==1' "$ENTRY_FILE")
 title=$(echo "$frontmatter" | sed -n 's/^title: *//p')
@@ -12,9 +21,16 @@ authors=$(echo "$frontmatter" | awk '/^authors:/,/^[^ ]/' | sed -n 's/^  - //p'
 # Extract body (everything after second ---)
 body=$(awk '/^---$/{if(++n==2){getline;found=1}}found' "$ENTRY_FILE")
 
-# Build comment
+# Build comment based on mode
+if [ "$MODE" = "existing" ]; then
+  header="This PR already has a changelog entry."
+else
+  header="@${PR_AUTHOR} A changelog entry has been added to this PR."
+fi
+
 cat >/tmp/pr-comment.md <<EOF
-@${PR_AUTHOR} A changelog entry has been added to this PR.
+${MARKER}
+${header}
 
 ## Metadata
